subject: docs(claude-md): sync HTTPS Proxy Support pattern from glow-props
body:
Added the HTTPS Proxy Support for Node.js Scripts suggested implementation
from the shared glow-props CLAUDE.md. This is the only new content — other
sections were already synced or are React-specific (adapted to Vue in this
project).

Risk: low
